sources.claim: Reusable prompts should be explicit, versioned/evaluable assets separated from code where possible.
sources.source: OpenAI prompt engineering / reusable prompts documentation

sources.claim: Evaluation is required because generative outputs vary and conventional deterministic software tests are insufficient.
Prompt optimization is a feedback loop using datasets/evals to improve prompts automatically.
sources.source: OpenAI prompt optimizer and model optimization docs

stage9_design_implications: candidate patches must be ranked before promotion
promotion must be fail-closed when quality score does not exceed baseline
ledger entries must retain rejected candidates for learning
